description: Manifest of project bench-metric files consumed by scripts/sync-metrics.mjs. Each entry maps a project slug to the repo path where bench/site-metrics.json lives. The sync script validates, stamps git sha + date, and writes src/data/metrics/<slug>.json.

projects.description: Attack success rate and severity-weighted risk across none/basic/hardened levels
MCP conformance test pass rates, statelessness round-robin latency
Route-path criterion bench results; overhead vs baseline
nDCG@10, MRR, Recall@k across millstone/tantivy/FTS5/vector retrievers
Per-model per-task conformance rates; taxonomy label breakdown
Scorer accuracy on golden sets; false-positive rate of drift detector
